meaning: n.末端,尽头,结束,目标,限度,梢,末端,死亡v.结束,终结,终止
examples: They live in the end house.
The summer came to an end.
The Corporate Market segment operates an ICT services and offering end-to-end solutions in infrastructure and network-related.
The battle for control of Australian gold producer Normandy appears to be nearing the end.
